items.title: Pope Leo XIV breaks tradition of acknowledging the Netherlands in first Easter address
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Analysis: Trump declares victory in Iran war after rescue, but threats to US operation still loom
items.dek: The rescue could impact how Trump views a ground operation to take Kharg Island or to seize enriched uranium sites.
items.body: The rescue could impact how Trump views a ground operation to take Kharg Island or to seize enriched uranium sites.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: How rescue of US airman in remote part of Iran unfolded
items.dek: The operation to extract him from the ground in hostile territory was hugely complex and involved multiple US government agencies.
items.body: The operation to extract him from the ground in hostile territory was hugely complex and involved multiple US government agencies.
